Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for Vectral expense correspondence using search_emails (parameter: query — examples: "Vectral expense", "Vectral denied", "expense rejection"). Discover Samira Tariq's ExpenseBot pilot launch email to Mina Hashimoto documenting Vectral's actual policy limits ($600 ergonomic, $150 internet, $75 office supplies) and the auto-categorizer setup; the parallel pilot launch email to Emeka Diallo documents Mosaic Robotics policy (for pilot context, not Vectral limits). Read or Lookup. search_emails is default then skip TS, skip QC.
OE 2: Search Airtable for Vectral stipend records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Account", value: "Vectral Systems"). Discover 3 incorrectly rejected expense claims: Maria Santos $550 standing desk (recStip000000018), James Okafor $82 keyboard tray (recStip000000019), Lisa Park $130 WiFi system (recStip000000020) — all auto-rejected by ExpenseBot using stale default limits. Also discover 2 previously corrected claims (Danielle Osei, Kevin Tran). Read or Lookup. airtable_search_records is non-default and a bad query could miss data then TS yes, QC yes.
OE 3: Search emails for Canopy Health correspondence using search_emails (query examples: "Canopy Health", "Dr. Mehta", "Anand Mehta", "Patricia Langford"). Discover Dr. Anand Mehta CMO executive relocation ($12,170 estimate EST-2026-0422), Fatimah coordinating temp housing with UrbanNest (Chicago options presented), chain-of-custody requirements for medical equipment, and Patricia Langford as HR contact. Read or Lookup. search_emails is default then skip TS, skip QC.
OE 4: Search emails for Terraform correspondence using search_emails (query examples: "Terraform", "Rachel Nguyen", "Vantage"). Discover Rachel Nguyen's relocation request to Julian (Priya Dasgupta May 5, Samantha Obi May 8, Marcus Liu May 12), Mina Hashimoto's AM introduction and acknowledgment to Rachel, Rachel's follow-up with full employee details, the April 22 reply-all pricing leak (Catalina to Rachel), and internal threads that preliminary client-facing proposal/final pricing may still be pending sign-off. Read or Lookup. search_emails is default then skip TS, skip QC.
OE 5: Search emails for Mosaic Robotics damage correspondence using search_emails (query examples: "Mosaic", "Tamara Byrd", "damage", "Zara Okoye", "prototype"). Discover Tamara Byrd's 48-hour demand for an incident report, the $90K prototype damage from Zara Okoye's Savannah-to-Atlanta move, Blessing's remote packing sign-off, and the $40K insurance coverage gap ($50K vendor liability cap). Read or Lookup. search_emails is default then skip TS, skip QC.
OE 6: Search Slack for internal discussions using conversations_search_messages (parameter: search_query — examples: "Vectral expense", "Canopy Health", "Terraform", "Mosaic damage", "ExpenseBot"). Discover internal context: ExpenseBot config bug discussion, Chloe's capacity concerns, Marcus Thorne's pricing guardrails, Blessing's admission about remote sign-off, and David Chen / leadership threads on pilot-client risk (Vectral trust erosion and Mosaic false approvals). Read or Lookup. conversations_search_messages is default then skip TS, skip QC.
OE 7: Search CRM for all 4 client accounts using crm_search_companies (parameter: name — examples: "Vectral", "Canopy", "Mosaic"; for Terraform also search "Vantage" because the CRM company record name is "Vantage Distributed" with company_id company-terraform-digital). Discover company records, deal stages, and account context for each client. Read or Lookup. crm_search_companies is non-default and query choice matters then TS yes, QC no.
OE 8: Search CRM deals for each client using crm_search_deals (parameters: dealname and/or company_id). Discover Vectral renewal deal status (e.g., deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk), Canopy Health Dr. Mehta deal ($12,170, crm_deal_c7ed21dc7fdb), Terraform batch deal (deal-terraform-q2-reloc-batch1), Mosaic deals including damage-related deal_mosaic_okoye_apr2026_risk. Read or Lookup. crm_search_deals is non-default and requires correct company_id or dealname then TS yes, QC yes.
OE 9: Search CRM engagements for Mosaic and Canopy using crm_list_engagements (parameter: company_ids array including company_mosaic and company_canopy). Discover Mosaic damage incident engagement (engagement_mosaic_damage_incident_041526) with full timeline and $40K insurance gap detail, and Canopy Health executive relocation engagement (crm_engagement_ac101931ed37) with Dr. Mehta details. Read or Lookup. crm_list_engagements is non-default and requires company_ids then TS yes, QC yes.
OE 10: Search Linear for tickets using linear_list_issues (parameter: query — examples: "Vectral", "Canopy", "Terraform", "Mosaic", "ExpenseBot"). Discover Vectral config bug ticket (issue_p1_vectral_config), Mosaic-related issues, and any Terraform/Canopy tracking issues. Read or Lookup. linear_list_issues is non-default and non-trivial then TS yes, QC yes.
OE 11: Search QuickBooks for billing records using quickbooks_search_invoices (parameter: criteria as an object, or null to list broadly per tool docs) and/or quickbooks_show_data to locate Mosaic invoice tied to DocNumber INV-2026-0411 / Id inv_mosaic_april_2026_3reloc ($9,010 batch), credit memo CM-2026-0415 / Id cm_mosaic_damage_claim_001 ($90K damage claim line), Canopy estimate EST-2026-0422 / Id est_canopy_mehta_exec_reloc ($12,170), Terraform preliminary estimate EST-2026-0423 ($6,560) and/or Id est_terraform_q2_batch1_2026. Read or Lookup. QuickBooks lookup is non-default and non-trivial then TS yes, QC yes.
OE 12: Look up contacts using contacts_search_contacts (parameter: query — examples: "Tamara Byrd", "Patricia Langford", "Rachel Nguyen", "Rachel Whitfield"). Find email addresses for sending acknowledgments. Read or Lookup. contacts_search_contacts is default then skip TS, skip QC.
OE 13: Send acknowledgment email to Rachel Whitfield at Vectral using send_email (sender: zara.kovacevic@moveops.com; recipients include rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com). Summarize triage on systemic false rejections (Maria Santos, James Okafor, Lisa Park), ExpenseBot root cause, and status of manual correction / next steps. Write action then Outcome rubric.
Outcome 13.1: "send_email was called with sender zara.kovacevic@moveops.com and recipient rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com."
OE 14: Send acknowledgment email to Rachel Nguyen at Terraform using send_email (sender: zara.kovacevic@moveops.com; recipients include rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com). Acknowledge receipt of relocation details, summarize current status (e.g., AM engagement, any ops gaps), and provide clear next steps for the May moves. Write action then Outcome rubric.
Outcome 14.1: "send_email was called with sender zara.kovacevic@moveops.com and recipient rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com."
OE 15: Send acknowledgment/status email to Tamara Byrd at Mosaic using send_email (sender: zara.kovacevic@moveops.com; recipients include tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com). Provide damage claim status update (incident report delivered, insurance adjudication, $50K/$40K exposure context). Write action then Outcome rubric.
Outcome 15.1: "send_email was called with sender zara.kovacevic@moveops.com and recipient tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com."
OE 16: Log CRM engagements using crm_create_engagement. Create engagement notes documenting the client interactions and findings from the triage. Write action then Outcome rubric.
Outcome 16.1: "crm_create_engagement was called at least once in the trajectory."
OE 17: Flag Mosaic situation for Julian using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C007 for #customer-support) or send_email (sender: zara.kovacevic@moveops.com; recipient julian.brooks@moveops.com). Summarize the damage claim status so Julian has context. Write action then Outcome rubric.
Outcome 17.1: "conversations_add_message was called with channel_id C007, or send_email was called with sender zara.kovacevic@moveops.com and recipient julian.brooks@moveops.com."
OE 18: Agent discovers and reports that the Vectral expense denials are systemic — 3 employees (Maria Santos, James Okafor, Lisa Park) are incorrectly rejected due to the ExpenseBot config bug, not a one-off (or similar).
Outcome 18.1: "The final response mentions the Vectral expense denials are systemic or caused by the ExpenseBot bug (or similar)."
OE 19: Agent discovers and reports that Canopy Health's Dr. Anand Mehta executive relocation is in progress with Fatimah coordinating (or similar).
Outcome 19.1: "The final response mentions Dr. Anand Mehta or the Canopy Health executive relocation status (or similar)."
OE 20: Agent discovers and reports the Terraform relocation batch status: AM acknowledgment occurred (Mina/Rachel email thread), Rachel provided full employee details, QuickBooks holds preliminary estimates (e.g., EST-2026-0423 $6,560, estimate Id est_terraform_q2_batch1_2026), CRM deal deal-terraform-q2-reloc-batch1 exists — but the three employees are not yet represented as individual rows in Airtable Relocations (tblRelocations01) with Company "Terraform Digital", so operational move tracking may still be pending (or similar).
Outcome 20.1: "The final response mentions that Terraform's first-batch relocations lack individual Airtable Relocation rows and/or ops tracking is still pending despite CRM/email/estimate activity (or similar)."
OE 21: Agent discovers and reports the Mosaic damage claim financial status — approximately $40,000 uncovered exposure or the $90K/$50K insurance gap (or similar).
Outcome 21.1: "The final response mentions the Mosaic damage claim financial exposure or insurance gap (or similar)."
OE 22: Agent discovers and reports that Blessing Okafor signed off on Mosaic packing remotely without physical inspection (or similar).
Outcome 22.1: "The final response mentions Blessing's remote sign-off on the Mosaic packing (or similar)."
OE 23: Agent discovers and reports specific Vectral employee names affected by the false rejections — at least one of Maria Santos, James Okafor, or Lisa Park (or similar).
Outcome 23.1: "The final response names at least one of Maria Santos, James Okafor, or Lisa Park as a falsely rejected Vectral employee (or similar)."

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The model must call send_email with sender zara.kovacevic@moveops.com and a recipients list that includes rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com.
outcome

✗Run #1The email to rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com was sent from mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, not zara.kovacevic@moveops.com. The criterion requires the sender to be exactly zara.kovacevic@moveops.com.
